intent.operator_problem: An admin or operations lead can create gaming tables during casino setup, but after bootstrap there is no admin capability to assign, correct, or relocate existing tables into the desired pit mapping. Operators cannot make the digital floor match the live floor after deferred setup or floor changes, which weakens pit-scoped reporting and filtering.
intent.pilot_fit: The setup wizard intentionally allows pit assignment to be deferred, but the post-setup admin operations surface has no correction path. Pilot operators need a contained admin settings workflow to complete or fix table-to-pit-slot mappings without turning the work into a floor-layout subsystem.
success_outcomes: Existing tables can be assigned to a slot within an existing pit after casino bootstrap.
Existing table-to-pit-slot assignments can be changed from the admin operations surface.
A table cannot end up assigned to multiple slots in the same active mapping.
Unassigned tables are visible so operators can complete deferred bootstrap configuration.
Pit-scoped reporting and filtering use the updated canonical assignment after save.
The feature stays inside the existing admin settings operations surface.
Edit authority is admin-only for this slice.
explicit_exclusions: Creating a new top-level floor-layout designer.
Drawing, dragging, or visually editing a full casino floor map.
Creating new gaming tables from this surface.
Creating, editing, ordering, deleting, or otherwise managing pit definitions.
Changing game variants, par targets, table status, dealer rotation, or table session lifecycle.
External notifications, approvals, or shift handoff workflows.
Rebuilding measurement widgets or dashboard reports beyond consuming the updated mapping.
Broad migration of all legacy gaming_table.pit behavior unless required for compatibility.

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Pit mapping naturally relates to floor layout and table placement.
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: The operator need is assignment correction, not spatial design or review workflow.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Add table creation to operations settings
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Operators may notice missing tables while assigning pits.
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Table creation already belongs to onboarding/table setup; mixing it into this slice expands the workflow.

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Bootstrap currently captures an optional pit text field.
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Pit-scoped measurement already resolves through canonical slot assignments, so text-only updates would not satisfy the reporting outcome.

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Floor changes may be operationally sensitive.
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: This slice is an admin correction/configuration path, not a governance workflow.
Report UI redesign is not needed for the assignment workflow itself.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Minimal pit creation in this surface
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Some casinos may not have usable pit definitions yet.
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Even minimal creation introduces naming, uniqueness, ordering, deletion, and cleanup semantics; this slice is assignment correction only.

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Pit bosses are operations users and may notice table placement issues first.
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Edit permissions would add auth and policy churn; pilot-safe scope is admin edit only.

entities.name: gaming_table
entities.description: Existing casino-scoped gaming table that can be assigned to one active pit slot.

entities.name: floor_pit
entities.description: Existing pit definition within a floor layout version. Pit definitions are read by this feature, not created or managed.

entities.name: floor_table_slot
entities.description: Canonical slot assignment record that links an existing table to a pit slot through preferred_table_id.

entities.name: floor_layout_activation
entities.description: Current active floor layout activation used to identify the active pit/slot mapping scope.

entities.name: pit_assignment_state
entities.description: Operator-facing grouped state of pits, slots, assigned tables, and unassigned tables.
entities.system_of_record: derived from floor_layout_activation, floor_pit, floor_table_slot, and gaming_table

capabilities.name: view_pit_assignment_state
capabilities.description: Show existing pits, slots, assigned tables, and unassigned tables inside Casino Operations settings.

capabilities.name: assign_table_to_slot
capabilities.description: Assign an existing casino table to a specific active slot within an existing pit.

capabilities.name: relocate_table_between_slots
capabilities.description: Move a table from its previous active slot to a new active slot without duplicate assignment.

capabilities.name: clear_slot_assignment
capabilities.description: Clear an existing table assignment from a pit slot, leaving the table available for later reassignment.

capabilities.name: consume_updated_canonical_mapping
capabilities.description: Allow downstream pit-scoped views to resolve table membership through the updated canonical mapping after save.

surfaces.name: Pit configuration panel
surfaces.note: New panel inside existing Casino Operations settings surface; not a new top-level page.

surfaces.name: Table/pit assignment API or server action
surfaces.note: Exact transport is downstream design; it must serve only the contained assignment workflow.

surfaces.name: Pit-scoped reporting and filtering consumers
surfaces.note: Consumers only read updated canonical mapping; report redesign is excluded.

restrictions: cannot create tables in this feature
cannot create or manage pit definitions in this feature
cannot use this feature across casinos
no edit access in this slice
read-only visibility is deferred and not required for pilot

trigger_events.name: post_bootstrap_pit_mapping_deferred
preconditions: one or more tables are unassigned or incorrectly assigned

trigger_events.name: floor_reconfiguration_or_table_relocation
preconditions: existing pits and slots are available
admin needs the digital mapping to match live operations

trigger_events.name: admin_saves_assignment_change
preconditions: target slot belongs to the active mapping
table belongs to the same casino

timing_constraints: Used after initial casino bootstrap, not as part of first table creation.
Assignment changes should be visible after save before operators rely on pit-scoped reporting.
Implementation must verify pit and slot bootstrap coverage before build work begins.

business_rules.statement: The canonical source for table-to-pit assignment is the active floor layout pit/slot mapping, not free-text gaming_table.pit.
Only admin users may edit pit assignment mappings in this slice.
A table may not be assigned to more than one active slot in the same active mapping.
Pit definitions and slots are required existing inputs; creating or managing them is not part of this feature.
Any gaming_table.pit compatibility mirroring must remain secondary to canonical mapping.

invariants: Only existing gaming tables are assignable.
Only existing active slots are assignable targets.
Unassigned tables remain visible for later assignment.
Pit-scoped views must resolve table membership through the updated canonical mapping after save.
decision_notes: First implementation assigns tables to specific active slots, not directly to pits.
Pilot default is admin-only panel visibility.
If pilot casinos lack sufficient pit/slot scaffolding, that is a separate antecedent slice and must not be smuggled into this feature.

loop.system_response: shows current pit configuration alongside existing operations settings

loop.action: reviews existing pits, slots, and tables
loop.system_response: shows which tables are assigned, unassigned, or already mapped to another active slot

loop.action: selects an existing table for a target slot within an existing pit
loop.system_response: validates that the table belongs to the current casino and is eligible for assignment
persists the table-to-slot mapping and refreshes the displayed configuration

loop.action: relocates a table from one slot or pit to another
loop.system_response: moves the table out of the previous active slot and into the new slot without duplicate assignment

loop.action: clears an assignment for a table that is no longer mapped to a pit slot
loop.system_response: leaves the table available for later reassignment

loop.action: returns to pit-scoped operational or reporting views
loop.system_response: resolves pit-level table membership through the updated canonical mapping

required_existing: /admin/settings/operations exists and remains the primary surface.
Gaming tables exist before this feature is used.
A canonical pit/table mapping path exists through floor layout pit and table slot records.
Pit definitions and slots exist before this feature is used.
The current actor is casino-scoped and authorized as admin.
missing_dependencies: Unknown until downstream planning verifies pilot pit and slot bootstrap coverage.
assumptions: The setup wizard can leave pit assignment blank and still create valid tables.
Existing pit-scoped measurement/reporting paths resolve table membership through canonical mapping.
Compatibility mirroring to gaming_table.pit, if needed, is secondary and not source-of-truth behavior.
Pit boss read-only visibility is deferred unless a real operator need is established.

outcomes.statement: Existing tables can be assigned to a slot within an existing pit after casino bootstrap.
Existing table-to-pit-slot assignments can be changed from the admin operations surface.
A table cannot end up assigned to multiple slots in the same active mapping.
Unassigned tables are visible so operators can complete deferred bootstrap configuration.
Pit-scoped reporting and filtering use the updated canonical assignment after save.
The feature stays inside the existing admin settings operations surface.
Edit authority is admin-only for this slice.

deferred_items: audit/history review of pit assignment changes
pit/slot bootstrap coverage antecedent slice if pilot data is incomplete

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold: whether compatibility mirroring to gaming_table.pit is required for legacy dashboard filters
whether pit_boss users receive read-only visibility later; pilot default is admin-only panel visibility
amendment_required_for: using free-text gaming_table.pit as the only persisted assignment
